differential_diagnoses: Leptomeningeal recurrence of diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL)
next_steps: Arbovirus PCR and serology panel for CSF and serum (specifically Powassan virus)
CSF metagenomic next-generation sequencing (mNGS) for infectious agents
Repeat CSF cytology with flow cytometry and EBV PCR to exclude occult lymphoma recurrence
MRI of the spine with contrast to evaluate for leptomeningeal disease
Electroencephalography (EEG) to rule out subclinical seizure activity given altered mental status
Send serum and CSF for a comprehensive paraneoplastic antibody panel
